evidence.quote: Stress mirror polishing, a novel technology is used to polish these aspherical M1 segments.
optical surface figure errors relative to the theoretical surface is < 1.73 μm peak-to-valley (P–V)
The glass blanks from Ohara, Japan, are stored for polishing at ITOFF

issues.reason: Text links Skidmore to science case requirements generally, but not explicitly to the 1.73 μm polishing spec.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Clarify that Skidmore provides high-level requirements, while technical specs are from project documentation.

evidence.quote: The polished roundels are hex-cut into hexagons ~1.44 m as measured across corners.
six-fold symmetry each of 82 unique segment types

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: After hex-cutting, the segments go through ion beam figuring (IBF).
surface roughness of both front and back surfaces need to be 20 Å RMS

evidence.quote: Each of the mirror segment is supported by a SSA that will hold the segment in position with minimal gravity distortion.
fabrication of SSA and the M1CS... carried out by the ITCC, through Indian Industrial contracts (Reddy 2013)
The primary mirror control system (M1CS) maintains the overall shape of the segmented primary mirror
